title: Tubnet Tweaks
description: A resource pack created for Tubnet which adds some tweaks to existing things on the server.
body:
Tubnet Tweaks is a resource pack for Tubnet which tweaks the textures/models of some things on the server.

These tweaks overall improve the quality of Tubnet and it's assets. 

Please note that you need the Server Pack Unlocker (https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) mod on fabric to use this resource pack.

This is my first time making an actual resource pack, so I thank you for downloading it!
